ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's marital status */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's gender */,
  "emp_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's employment status */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "from_diversity_job_fair_id" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the employee was hired from a diversity job fair */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's position */,
  "race_desc" TEXT /* Description of the employee's race */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's manager */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the employee */,
  "emp_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Employee satisfaction score */,
  "special_projects_count" INTEGER /* Count of special projects the employee has worked on */,
  "last_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  "days_late_last_30" INTEGER /* Number of days the employee was late in the last 30 days */,
  "employee_email" TEXT /* Unique email address for each employee */,
  "employee_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for each employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the employee is currently active */,
  "employee_address" TEXT /* The employee's mailing address */,
  "employee_city" TEXT /* The employee's city */,
  "employee_state" TEXT /* The employee's state */,
  "employee_zip" TEXT /* The employee's zip code */,
  "employee_country" TEXT /* The employee's country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* The name of the department */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* A description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* The name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* A description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* The name of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* The marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "emp_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "emp_status" TEXT /* The employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diversity_job_fairs" (
  "from_diversity_job_fair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diversity job fair */,
  "job_fair_name" TEXT /* The name of the diversity job fair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("from_diversity_job_fair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "performance_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* The employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* The date of the performance review */,
  "review_score" REAL /* The score given during the performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_projects" (
  "special_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special project */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* The employee working on the special project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* The name of the special project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the special project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the special project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("special_project_id")
)
